text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today's the Spring Fan Fest, and<n>Tracen's
Umamusume are putting on<n>a show for their fans
by competing in<n>different contests.

Run a three-legged race with your<n>trainer? What's
the meaning of this?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Exactly what it sounds like. You have<n>to partner up
with your trainer and do<n>a three-legged race
together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Destroy the competition and win.<n>That's all there
is to it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I meant. I mean why<n>the heck
was I entered in this?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Cause you were playing hooky when<n>we were
deciding who would do<n>what.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
No one applied for this race, but<n>someone had to
do it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The student council decided, so if you<n>have a
problem, take it up with them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You know what? I do have aproblem! Why me of all people?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide said the best way to keep<n>you from
slacking off was to pair you<n>up with your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Isn't that nice?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Here, take my dang right foot and tie<n>it up already!
Ugh, let's just get this<n>over with!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why Taishin is so upset,<n>but whether
she likes it or not, we're<n>running a three-legged
race together!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text: Racers, are you ready? Get set... and<n>start!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! One—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Come on, is this all you've<n>got?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Taishin's doing her best to work with<n>me, but
she's still an Umamusume.<n>There's no way I can
run as fast as<n>her!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: At this rate, we'll lose for sure!
choice_data_list: Forget about me. Give it all you've got, Taishin!
Forget about me. Give it all you've got, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! If I do that, you'll—
choice_data_list: I'm with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You better not regret this!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She begins running without heed to<n>my pace...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're awake.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Tch, I knew this was gonna happen.<n>You way
overdid it, idiot.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Crick!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: See? Now all your muscles are<n>spasming.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, lie face down. I'll help<n>massage out the
cramps.
choice_data_list: You don't have to do tha—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Just be quiet!
Narita Taishin begins to knead my<n>seized muscles.
Shut your trap!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This is what boneheads like you get<n>for trying too
hard.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: We hurriedly pick up our pace.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, slow down. I don't want you to<n>overdo it.
Slow down!
choice_data_list: But if we don't speed up—

text_block_list.text:
It's fine to hang back for now. Just<n>match my
stride at the last stretch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's all we need to do to catch up.<n>We'll give it
a big boost at the end!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
The runners are coming up on the<n>final stretch!
Which pair will finish<n>first?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Here we go! One, two! One, two!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Narita Taishin and her<n>trainer are
charging up from behind!

They're making an electrifying break<n>for
it—they're passing all the others!<n>Wow, they've
done it! They've won<n>first!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooo! Great job, Team Taishin!
Huff... huff... That was way harder...than any race I've ever run...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I've never felt more exhausted in my<n>life. I feel
about ready to collapse on<n>the spot.
choice_data_list: (But the way we ran at the last stretch...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? Why are you staring at me?
choice_data_list: Your final sprint is seriously incredible.
Your final sprint is seriously incredible.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Don't get all weird... dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: This experience was truly an amazing<n>one.
